page_metadata.biotools__summary: Reformats an input file generated by a MiSeq/HiSeq system, where reads are formatted in a scheme that includes a space-character, which might not correctly be used in downstream operations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Reformats an input file generated by a MiSeq/HiSeq system, where reads are formatted in a scheme that includes a space-character, which might not correctly be used in downstream operations.
